case_title: ALBERT TOM VS. CONOCO PHILLIPS OIL COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,476.38 FILED BY TOM, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CONOCO PHILLIPS OIL COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TOM, ALBERT ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CONOCO PHILLIPS OIL COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM, ALBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONOCO PHILLIPS OIL COMPANY COURT DETERMINES THAT BILL OF LADING IS SUFFICIENT PROOF OF DELIVERY AND THAT CHARGE TO PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT, THOUGH DELAYED, WAS PROPER. NO INTEREST IS DUE TO DEFENDANT FOR PERIOD OF DELAY BEFORE PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-28-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONOCO PHILLIPS OIL COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2007 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD, CLERK: S.VANTREE, BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PARTIES RETAINED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD, CLERK: S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-01-2010
